# SymbolFYI Embed Widget

> Embeddable SymbolFYI widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/symbolfyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://symbolfyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.symbolfyi.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/symbolfyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/symbolfyi-embed
- API: https://symbolfyi.com/developers/

## Creative FYI Widget Family

- [ColorFYI Widget](https://widget.colorfyi.com)
- [FontFYI Widget](https://widget.fontfyi.com)
- [EmojiFYI Widget](https://widget.emojifyi.com)
- [UnicodeFYI Widget](https://widget.unicodefyi.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
